description: MandarinOS persona schema. Each persona = one JSON file in this directory. Adding a persona = adding one file. No code changes required.

required_fields.display_name: string — Chinese name shown to learner (e.g. '小明')

optional_fields.description: string — short English bio for admin/debug display

profile.note: All profile fields are optional. Partial profiles are valid.
profile.city: string — current city in Chinese (e.g. '北京')
profile.interests: array of strings — in Chinese (e.g. ['弹吉他', '爬山'])
profile.personality_tags: array of strings — in Chinese (e.g. ['外向', '好奇'])

voice_lines.note: One short sentence per engine. Prepended to the EXTEND frame text as a persona-specific detail. Missing engines fall back gracefully to the generic frame text alone. All sentences should be 1 sentence, first-person, specific to this persona.

discoverable_facts.note: One longer disclosure per engine. Used to reveal deeper personal details as the conversation deepens (future phase). May reference personal history, preferences, or experiences specific to this persona.

extensibility_note: To add a persona: create a new .json file in this directory following this schema. The server discovers all *.json files (excluding _*.json) automatically on startup. No code changes are required.

example_full_persona.description: Software engineer, Beijing, originally from Chengdu

discoverable_facts.work: 我在一家做人工智能的公司工作，主要负责语音识别。
